nic health records and genetic data to identify high-risk patients, enabling earlier intervention and reducing healthcare costs.

Regulatory frameworks are still evolving, and liability questions persist. Despite these hurdles, the future is promising with explainable AI and federated learning, aiming to augment human medical expertise for improved, cost-effective, and accessible global healthcare."""

print("summary_output.txt created successfully.")
